title: Integer-Sequence Oracle — extrapolating recurrence discovery
strategies: constant baseline: predict the last observed term (ignores all structure) -> ~0.1
degree-3 polynomial least-squares fit in the index n: nails figurate/polynomial sequences, extrapolates poorly on exponential n-nacci growth
order-3 linear-recurrence fit a(n)=c1*a(n-1)+c2*a(n-2)+c3*a(n-3): recovers the dominant linear-recurrence signal, extrapolating far better on Fibonacci/n-nacci and low-degree figurate sequences

alternatives: higher-order recurrence fits, exact integer recurrence recovery (Berlekamp-Massey style), mixed exponential-polynomial closed forms, or robust fits that resist the far-future jitter floor
